prompt_text:
### Demographics: 51-year-old Asian woman

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 13 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after hyperglycemia symptoms (polyuria, polydipsia, weight loss)
Current symptoms: Reports 1-2 mild hypoglycemia episodes per month (self-resolved); no DKA/HHS signs

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 2 (60-89)
Heart failure: HFmrEF (NYHA Class III)
ASCVD: Peripheral artery disease
MASH
Body mass index category: Normal
Diabetic retinopathy
Diabetic Retinopathy
Chronic Obstructive Pulmonary Disease
Osteoporosis (on bisphosphonate therapy)
Female Breast Cancer (Endocrine Therapy)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 2 (60-89); HF: HFmrEF (NYHA Class III); ASCVD: Peripheral artery disease; MASLD: MASH; BMI Category: Normal
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (younger brother)
- Social history: Never smoker; Alcohol 1-2 drinks/month

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 1000mg twice daily; Semaglutide 1mg once weekly; Dapagliflozin 10mg once daily; Fluticasone/salmeterol Inhaler (twice daily), Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Lisinopril (10 mg daily), Alendronate (70 mg weekly), Calcium Carbonate 500 Mg + Cholecalciferol 1000 Iu (daily), Tamoxifen (20 mg daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 54.6 kg; Height 166.9 cm; BMI 19.6 kg/m²; Blood pressure 118/77 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 9.9%; 9 months ago 9.6%; 6 months ago 9.1%; 3 months ago 8.6%; current 6.9%), FPG (12 months ago 242mg/dL; 9 months ago 251mg/dL; 6 months ago 255mg/dL; 3 months ago 219mg/dL; current 163mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 56.1kg; 9 months ago 55.8kg; 6 months ago 52.3kg; 3 months ago 55.9kg; current 54.6kg), Height (12 months ago 166.9cm; 9 months ago 166.9cm; 6 months ago 166.9cm; 3 months ago 166.9cm; current 166.9cm), BMI (12 months ago 20.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 20.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 19.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 20.0kg/m²; current 19.6kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 120mmHg; 9 months ago 120mmHg; 6 months ago 120mmHg; 3 months ago 120mmHg; current 118mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 74mmHg; 9 months ago 76mmHg; 6 months ago 75mmHg; 3 months ago 76mmHg; current 77mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 99U/L; 9 months ago 95U/L; 6 months ago 99U/L; 3 months ago 93U/L; current 100U/L), AST (12 months ago 70U/L; 9 months ago 76U/L; 6 months ago 69U/L; 3 months ago 78U/L; current 75U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 1.7mg/dL; 9 months ago 1.6mg/dL; 6 months ago 1.6mg/dL; 3 months ago 1.6mg/dL; current 1.5mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 64mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 68mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 65mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 66mL/min/1.73m²; current 65mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 33mg/g; 9 months ago 23mg/g; 6 months ago 31mg/g; 3 months ago 23mg/g; current 28mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 80mg/dL; 9 months ago 79mg/dL; 6 months ago 84mg/dL; 3 months ago 79mg/dL; current 82mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 52mg/dL; 9 months ago 53mg/dL; 6 months ago 49mg/dL; 3 months ago 50mg/dL; current 51mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 155mg/dL; 9 months ago 170mg/dL; 6 months ago 171mg/dL; 3 months ago 156mg/dL; current 163mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 12.0g/dL; 9 months ago 12.0g/dL; 6 months ago 12.8g/dL; 3 months ago 12.1g/dL; current 12.8g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide 1.29 ng/mL (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Excellent adherence (estimated ≥90%); SMBG 4-5 times/week; diet/exercise well controlled.
Financial context: Patient has comprehensive insurance with minimal out-of-pocket burden and reports no financial barriers to clinically indicated therapies (budget ≤ KRW 1,000,000/month).
